name: Glazed Apple Pie Bars
recipeIngredient: Beaten with enough milk to equal 2/3 cup (reserve white)
8 cups cooking apples, cored, peeled, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour and salt; cut in butter until crumbly.
3. With a fork, stir in egg yolk and milk until dough forms a ball. Divide into two halves.
4. On lightly floured surface, roll out one half of dough into a 15 x 10 rectangle and place on the bottom of an ungreased 15 x 10 x 1 jelly roll pan.
5. Sprinkle with cereal; layer apples over cereal.
6. In a small bowl, combine 1 cup sugar, 1 1/2 teaspoons cinnamon, and nutmeg. Sprinkle over apples.
7. Roll out remaining half of dough into a 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 rectangle and place over apples.
8. Beat egg white with a fork until foamy; brush over the top crust.
9. In a small bowl, stir together 2 tablespoons sugar and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon; sprinkle over crust.
10. Bake for 45 to 60 minutes or until lightly browned.
11. In a small bowl, stir together all glaze ingredients; drizzle over warm crust.
12. Cut into bars.
